mcp.description: WebMCP Demo Store — An AI-ready e-commerce site. AI agents can browse, search, and purchase products directly through the MCP protocol. No web scraping required.

tools.name: search_products
tools.description: Search for products in the store catalog. Supports filtering by query, category, price range, and stock availability.

tools.name: get_product
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific product by its ID.

tools.name: purchase_item
tools.description: Purchase one or more items from the store. Creates an order and returns the order confirmation with an order ID.

tools.name: get_order_status
tools.description: Get the status of a previous order by order ID.

tools.name: get_store_info
tools.description: Get information about the store, including available categories and capabilities.
